name: Data Science
description: Curated list of github repositories related to data-science.

content.intro: The Data Science topic encompasses tools, frameworks, and libraries that address common challenges in this domain.
content.who_this_topic_is_for: Developers, data scientists, and engineers interested in implementing Data Science capabilities into their applications.
content.common_architecture: Projects in the Data Science space typically involve specialized processing pipelines or standardized APIs tailored for these specific use cases.
content.pros_cons: Pros: Access to specialized, community-driven tools. Cons: Ecosystem can be fragmented, requiring careful evaluation of 1 or more alternative repositories.
